step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the selection of Coxiella burnetii as the obligate intracellular parasite. Further supporting this, Coxiella burnetii has been shown to reside within macrophages where it manipulates host cell functions to promote its own proliferation and dissemination, making it even more clear that no extracellular environment can support its lifecycle effectively.
raw_response:
I agree with the selection of Coxiella burnetii as the obligate intracellular parasite. Further supporting this, Coxiella burnetii has been shown to reside within macrophages where it manipulates host cell functions to promote its own proliferation and dissemination, making it even more clear that no extracellular environment can support its lifecycle effectively. 

Answer: D.
```
